product_description: NoRedInk is a web-based platform that offers an adaptive online writing curriculum for grades 3-12, helping students practice and apply writing and grammar skills through personalized, interactive activities. It provides engaging content and differentiated instruction to improve writing proficiency.

vendor_resources.justification: This is the main accessibility page for NoRedInk, detailing features, standards, and linking to their VPAT/ACR.

other_resources.justification: This is a case study by Zenyth Group detailing their comprehensive WCAG 2.1 Level AA audit and accessibility enhancement collaboration with NoRedInk.
